tasks.title: Extract buildStagePrompt() from spawnStage() in pipelineManager.js
tasks.description: Refactor the inline prompt-building logic in spawnStage() (lines 366-409) into a standalone exported function buildStagePrompt(dataDir, spaceId, taskId, stageIndex, agentId, stages). The function reads the task from the space, appends artifact paths from previous stages, git context, and compile gate. Returns { promptText, estimatedTokens }. spawnStage() calls this function instead of building inline. No behavior change.
acceptance_criteria: buildStagePrompt() is exported from pipelineManager.js
spawnStage() calls buildStagePrompt() and produces identical prompt text as before
Existing pipeline tests pass without modification
Function returns { promptText: string, estimatedTokens: number }

tasks.title: Persist stage prompt to stage-N-prompt.md in spawnStage()
tasks.description: After buildStagePrompt() returns, write the promptText to data/runs/<runId>/stage-<N>-prompt.md using the atomic .tmp + rename pattern. Add stagePromptPath() helper exported alongside stageLogPath(). Write happens before child.stdin.write(taskPrompt). Emit a structured log event 'stage_prompt_persisted' with runId, stageIndex, sizeBytes.
acceptance_criteria: After spawnStage() runs, data/runs/<runId>/stage-<N>-prompt.md exists on disk
File content matches what was piped to child.stdin
stagePromptPath() is exported from pipelineManager.js
Structured log line '[PIPELINE] {"event":"stage_prompt_persisted",...}' is emitted to stderr

tasks.title: Add GET /api/v1/runs/:runId/stages/:stageIndex/prompt endpoint
tasks.description: Add handleGetStagePrompt to src/handlers/pipeline.js. Reads stagePromptPath() file and returns it as text/plain. Returns 404 PROMPT_NOT_AVAILABLE if the file does not exist. Wire the route in server.js using pattern PIPELINE_RUNS_PROMPT_ROUTE = /^\/api\/v1\/runs\/([^/]+)\/stages\/(\d+)\/prompt$/.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/runs/:runId/stages/0/prompt returns 200 with text/plain content after a stage has started
Returns 404 with code PROMPT_NOT_AVAILABLE for stages that have not started
Returns 404 RUN_NOT_FOUND for invalid runId
Content-Type header is text/plain; charset=utf-8

tasks.title: Add POST /api/v1/runs/preview-prompts endpoint
tasks.description: Add handlePreviewPrompts to src/handlers/pipeline.js. Accepts { spaceId, taskId, stages[] }. For each stage, calls buildStagePrompt() to generate the prompt text without starting a run. Returns { prompts: [{ stageIndex, agentId, promptFull, estimatedTokens }] }. Validates spaceId, taskId, and all agent files exist. Wire the route in server.js. The route pattern must be checked BEFORE the :runId catch-all regex to avoid conflicts.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/runs/preview-prompts returns 200 with prompts array
Each prompt entry contains stageIndex, agentId, promptFull (string), estimatedTokens (number)
Returns 404 if task or space not found
Returns 422 if any agent file is missing
Does NOT create a run directory or any files on disk
Route ordering in server.js places this before PIPELINE_RUNS_SINGLE_ROUTE

tasks.title: Add promptFull to POST /api/v1/agent/prompt response
tasks.description: In src/handlers/prompt.js handleGeneratePrompt(), add promptFull: promptText to the sendJSON response alongside the existing promptPreview (kept for backward compat). This is a one-line change in the sendJSON call.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/agent/prompt response includes promptFull field with the complete prompt text
promptPreview field still contains the first 500 chars (unchanged)
estimatedTokens, promptPath, and cliCommand are unchanged

tasks.title: Update frontend types and API client for prompt improvements
tasks.description: In frontend/src/types/index.ts: add promptFull to PromptGenerationResponse and PreparedRun. Add PipelinePromptPreviewEntry and PipelinePromptPreview types. In frontend/src/api/client.ts: add getStagePrompt(runId, stageIndex) returning Promise<string> (text response) and previewPipelinePrompts(spaceId, taskId, stages) returning Promise<PipelinePromptPreview>. Update prepareAgentRun in useAppStore.ts to store result.promptFull in preparedRun.
acceptance_criteria: PromptGenerationResponse has promptFull: string field
PreparedRun has promptFull: string field
PipelinePromptPreview type exists with prompts array
getStagePrompt() and previewPipelinePrompts() are exported from client.ts
prepareAgentRun stores promptFull from the API response
TypeScript compiles with no errors

tasks.title: Update AgentPromptPreview to show full prompt
tasks.description: In AgentPromptPreview.tsx: replace preparedRun.promptPreview with preparedRun.promptFull in the MarkdownViewer. Add a collapse/expand toggle: collapsed shows first 500 chars (the old preview behavior), expanded shows the full text. Default to expanded. The edit mode textarea also uses promptFull. Update token badge to use the accurate estimatedTokens from the response.
acceptance_criteria: AgentPromptPreview modal shows complete prompt text by default
A toggle allows switching between full prompt and 500-char preview
Edit mode textarea starts with full prompt text
Token badge displays correctly
No visual regressions in modal layout

tasks.title: Add Prompt/Log toggle to PipelineLogPanel
tasks.description: In PipelineLogPanel.tsx: add a two-option toggle (Prompt | Log) below the StageTabBar. Default to 'Log' (current behavior). When 'Prompt' is selected, call getStagePrompt(runId, stageIndex) and display the result in a read-only MarkdownViewer within the same flex container as LogViewer. Cache fetched prompts in usePipelineLogStore to avoid re-fetching on tab switches. Show a 404-friendly empty state if the prompt is not yet available.
acceptance_criteria: PipelineLogPanel shows a Prompt/Log toggle below the stage tabs
Selecting 'Prompt' fetches and displays the stage prompt via GET endpoint
Prompt text is rendered in MarkdownViewer
If prompt is not available (404), show a user-friendly empty state
Switching between Prompt and Log does not lose scroll position in Log
Fetched prompts are cached per (runId, stageIndex) in the store

tasks.title: Add Preview Prompts button to PipelineConfirmModal
tasks.description: In PipelineConfirmModal.tsx: add a 'Preview Prompts' button (secondary variant, positioned between the stage list and the orchestrator toggle). When clicked, call previewPipelinePrompts(spaceId, taskId, stages). Show a loading spinner while fetching. Once loaded, render a collapsible section under each stage row with the prompt text in a scrollable container (max-h-48, bg-surface-variant, monospace). Add a 'Hide Prompts' toggle to collapse all. If the user reorders/removes stages after previewing, clear the cached prompts and show the button again.
acceptance_criteria: PipelineConfirmModal has a 'Preview Prompts' button
Button triggers POST /api/v1/runs/preview-prompts with current spaceId, taskId, and stages
Loading spinner is visible during fetch
After fetch, each stage row expands to show the prompt text
Prompt sections are collapsible
Reordering or removing stages clears the preview cache
Errors are shown as a toast

tasks.title: Backend tests for prompt persistence and new endpoints
tasks.description: Write tests using node:test for: (1) buildStagePrompt() returns expected prompt structure; (2) spawnStage() creates stage-N-prompt.md; (3) GET /api/v1/runs/:runId/stages/:stageIndex/prompt returns correct content; (4) POST /api/v1/runs/preview-prompts returns prompts for all stages without creating a run. Tests go in tests/prompt-improvements.test.js.
acceptance_criteria: Test file tests/prompt-improvements.test.js exists
Tests cover buildStagePrompt output structure
Tests verify stage-N-prompt.md is created by spawnStage
Tests verify GET stage prompt endpoint returns text/plain
Tests verify POST preview-prompts returns array without side effects
All tests pass with node --test

tasks.title: Frontend tests for prompt preview components
tasks.description: Write Vitest + RTL tests for: (1) AgentPromptPreview shows full prompt text and toggle works; (2) PipelineLogPanel Prompt/Log toggle renders correctly; (3) PipelineConfirmModal Preview Prompts button triggers API call and shows results. Tests go alongside existing test files in frontend/__tests__/components/.
acceptance_criteria: AgentPromptPreview test verifies full prompt is shown by default
AgentPromptPreview test verifies toggle between full and preview modes
PipelineLogPanel test verifies Prompt/Log toggle rendering
PipelineConfirmModal test verifies Preview Prompts button interaction
All tests pass with npm test in frontend/
